message: FED staged scoped files for design-principal review. Original status=done; original message: Autonomous decision: converted 6 Hugo templates to Carbon React TSX (authentication pages + products CRUD). Design principal review enabled—changes staged without eval/commit. Partial migration: no React runtime exists, requires framework-era-swap completion. Staged files: content/authentication/sign-in.tsx, forgot-password.tsx, reset-password.tsx, sign-up.tsx, profile-lock.tsx, content/crud/products.tsx. Changes staged for design principal review.
